chunks.content:
func integerField(value any) (int, bool) {
	switch typed := value.(type) {
	case int:
		return typed, true
	case int32:
		return int(typed), true
	case int64:
		return int(typed), true
	case float64:
		converted := int(typed)
		return converted, float64(converted) == typed
	default:
		return 0, false
	}
}
